INTRVNS_ACS_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Access (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient had IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
616 INTRVNS_ACS_DSCHRG_CD INTRVNS_ACS_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Access (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient had IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
617 PRPHRL_ADMSN_CD PRPHRL_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Access - Peripheral (Admission) CHAR 1 This
